_comment: The case is EVTX-only, so the expected findings remain HYPOTHESIS and the honest top-line verdict is INDETERMINATE unless another artifact class corroborates them.
Local-only until upstream EVTX sample provenance is documented.
source_url: local-only EVTX attack-sample training case; raw fixtures not redistributed
license: VERDICT-authored answer key; raw EVTX provenance must be verified before publishing or redistributing the fixtures

findings.description: Remote WMI process execution appears in Security Event ID 4688 with WmiPrvSE.exe as the parent process
findings.artifact_hint: Security EVTX EID 4688 child process under WmiPrvSE.exe, with related network logon context

findings.description: EVTX EID 7045 records installation of service spoolfool with image cmd.exe
